steps.t: Zidek is trying to send the hungry dog away. You should talk to Zidek.
Zidek tried sending the hungry dog away, but you took pity upon the animal and bought some meat for the dog. You should give it to him.
You have given meat you bought from Zidek to the hungry stray and can see that he is a gentle and intelligent dog. You should give him some pats.
You have given meat you bought from Zidek to the hungry stray and can see that he is a gentle and intelligent dog. Afterward, you gave the good dog so…
Zidek said he would feed the dog if he serves as the protector and companion of Ubdun the goatherd. He has pointed to a large, juicy steak on the tabl…
The dog has followed you, or rather the steak, to Ubdun's location, near Jirush. You should talk to Ubdun.
